segment.source: Renders a slim separator in three variants — plain horizontal rule, rule with centered text label, or decorative line with middle dot — plus spacing (small/default/large) and color (default/muted/primary) options. Use it for: thematic breaks in long documents, asterisk or horizontal-rule markers in source text, transitions between chapters or topic shifts. Prefer 'Section Header' when the break carries a heading and intro; 'Divider' is the simpler core equivalent.
